title: monogramma graminoides
intro: Monogramma graminoides, also known as the rock fern or grass-like fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, including Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Monogramma graminoides include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
